title: Baseline QV gates to prevent fix-cycle scope expansion

steps.description: Database: add QvBaseline ORM model in orch/db/models.py + Alembic migration under orch/db/migrations/versions/. Unique constraint on (step_id, gate_name, base_sha), FK to workflow_steps.id ON DELETE CASCADE, iw_core_baseline marker in migration docstring.
Code review: S01 (schema correctness, unique constraint + CASCADE, migration up/down symmetry, iw_core_baseline marker, no drive-by schema changes).

Backend (pure module): orch/daemon/qv_baseline.py with ruff/pytest/mypy parsers, Fingerprint dataclass, subtract(current, baseline), fingerprint round-trip serializers, and GATE_PARSERS map. IW_CORE_BASELINE_QV env var + DaemonConfig.baseline_qv_enabled in orch/config.py. No DB calls, no subprocess orchestration — S05 owns integration.

Code review: S03 (parser correctness on real ruff/pytest/mypy output, fingerprint determinism — Invariant 6, subtraction algebra — Invariants 3/4, JSON round-trip, no hidden side effects, config flag follows IW_CORE_* pattern).

Backend (integration): hook baseline compute after _setup_worktree in orch/daemon/batch_manager.py; apply subtraction in orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py:_get_qv_findings; implement lazy rebase invalidation (stale base_sha → delete + recompute); honor kill switch; legacy items pass through.

Code review: S05 (hook placement correctness, subtraction replaces — not augments — legacy path, AC4 stale-SHA handling including IntegrityError path, AC5 kill-switch short-circuits both compute and subtract, AC6 legacy-item graceful fallthrough, DB commit hygiene, no changes outside declared files).

Tests: unit tests for parsers + subtraction algebra (AC1/AC2 correctness anchor), integration tests for AC1–AC6 end-to-end pipeline behaviour with testcontainer DB, bundled unit tests for executor/scope_gate.py (AC7, 12 sub-cases), query-count guard against N+1 in _compute_qv_baselines.

Code review: S07 (AC1–AC7 coverage table, tests FAIL on pre-fix code where applicable, testcontainer compliance — no port 5433, no importlib.reload, no psycopg2:// URLs, fixture reuse per tests/CLAUDE.md, scope discipline on diff).

Final cross-agent review: AC1–AC7 traced end-to-end, all 8 Invariants hold, scope discipline IRON-TIGHT (diff = declared scope.allowed_paths), CLAUDE.md compliance, full test pipeline green, migration up/down exercised in testcontainer.
